name: beehiiv
description: beehiiv newsletter platform integration. Manage publications, subscribers, and posts. Create and send newsletters, manage subscriber lists, and publish content.

tools.name: list_publications
tools.description: Retrieve all publications associated with your beehiiv API key. Returns publication details including IDs, names, and settings.

tools.name: list_subscribers
tools.description: List all subscribers for a specific publication. Supports pagination and filtering by email, status, and tier.

publication_id.description: The ID of the publication (format: pub_xxxxx).

email.description: Filter subscribers by email address. Optional.

limit.description: Number of results to return per page. Max 100. Optional.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response. Optional.

tools.name: create_subscriber
tools.description: Create a new subscriber (subscription) for a publication. Provide the subscriber's email and optional details like UTM parameters and custom fields.

publication_id.description: The ID of the publication (format: pub_xxxxx).

email.description: The email address of the new subscriber.

reactivate_existing.description: If true, reactivate an existing inactive subscription instead of failing. Defaults to false.

send_welcome_email.description: Whether to send the welcome email to the new subscriber. Defaults to false.

utm_source.description: UTM source for tracking where this subscriber came from.

referring_site.description: The URL of the site that referred this subscriber.

custom_fields.description: Array of custom field objects with 'name' and 'value' keys.

tools.name: get_subscriber
tools.description: Retrieve a specific subscriber by their subscription ID. Returns detailed subscriber information including status, subscription date, and custom fields.

publication_id.description: The ID of the publication (format: pub_xxxxx).

subscription_id.description: The ID of the subscription/subscriber to retrieve.

tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: List all posts for a specific publication. Returns post details including title, status, publish date, and content metadata. Supports pagination.

publication_id.description: The ID of the publication (format: pub_xxxxx).

limit.description: Number of results to return per page. Max 100. Optional.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response. Optional.

tools.name: create_post
tools.description: Create a new post (newsletter) in a publication. Provide the title and content as raw HTML or structured blocks. Posts can be published immediately, scheduled, or saved as drafts.

publication_id.description: The ID of the publication (format: pub_xxxxx).

subtitle.description: The subtitle/preview text for the post. Optional.

body_content.description: The content of the post as raw HTML. Either body_content or blocks must be provided.

status.description: Post status. 'confirmed' publishes immediately (or at scheduled_at time). 'draft' saves as draft. Defaults to 'confirmed'.

scheduled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when to publish the post. If not provided and status is 'confirmed', publishes immediately.

authors.description: Array of author IDs to attribute the post to.
